name: Vegetable Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 6 Chinese mushrooms, soaked in warm water and shredded
3 large Celery stalks, shredded to about 3-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the fresh noodles and cook until just done, about 4 minutes. Drain well and rinse briefly in cold water. Mix in a little oil to prevent sticking.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Stir-fry the mushrooms, celery, bamboo shoots, and bean sprouts for about 2-3 minutes until just tender-crisp.
3. Add salt, broth, mushroom water, oyster sauce, and sugar to the vegetables. Push the vegetables up against one side of the wok.
4. Add the cooked noodles to the wok and gently toss with the vegetables to warm everything through.
5. If a thicker sauce is desired, add 1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 1 teaspoon water and stir until the sauce thickens slightly.
